initiatives.name: Wenatchee Pride
initiatives.description: Wenatchee Pride's mission is to empower and connect the NCW LGBTQIA2S+ community and its allies toward creating and maintaining a safe, anti-racist, inclusive and equitable environment for all.

initiatives.name: Wenatchee for Palestine
initiatives.description: Organizing for Palestinian liberation on Šnp̍əšqʷáw̉šəxʷi land (Wenatchee, WA)

initiatives.name: Wenatchee for Immigrant Justice
initiatives.description: Equity, Opportunity, and Justice in Solidarity with the Immigrant Community.

initiatives.name: PFLAG Wenatchee
initiatives.description: Dedicated to supporting, educating, and advocating for LGBTQ+ people and those who love them.
